recommendations.title: Dust Bunny
recommendations.overview: Ten-year-old Aurora asks her hitman neighbor to kill the monster under her bed that she claims ate her family. To protect her, he must battle an onslaught of assassins while accepting that some monsters are real.

recommendations.title: Lou
recommendations.overview: A Pixar short about a lost-and-found box and the unseen monster within.

recommendations.title: Doug's 1st Movie
recommendations.overview: Doug and his pal Skeeter set's out to find the monster of Lucky Duck Lake. Though things get really out of hand when some one blurts out that the monster is real.

recommendations.title: Super Mario Brothers: Great Mission to Rescue Princess Peach
recommendations.overview: When Princess Peach is kidnapped by the monster King Koopa, Mario and his brother Luigi journey to the Mushroom Kingdom to rescue her.

recommendations.title: Monster Family
recommendations.overview: The Wishbone family are far from happy. In an attempt to reconnect as a family, they plan a fun night out. However, the plan backfires when they are cursed and all turned into Monsters.

recommendations.title: Monster Hunt
recommendations.overview: Young monster kids try to make peace between the world of humans and the world of the monsters.

recommendations.title: Monster High: The Movie
recommendations.overview: Clawdeen Wolf, half human and half werewolf, has recently started attending Monster High, a school for monsters in all forms. After quickly befriending her classmates Frankie Stein and Draculaura, Clawdeen feels like she has finally found a place whe

recommendations.title: Monster Hunt 2
recommendations.overview: The sequel to Monster Hunt. Set in a world where monsters and humans co-exist, the franchise tells the story of Wuba, a baby monster born to be king. Wuba becomes the central figure in stopping an all-out monster civil war.

recommendations.title: Rumble
recommendations.overview: In a world where monster wrestling is a global sport and monsters are superstar athletes, teenage Winnie seeks to follow in her father’s footsteps by coaching a loveable underdog monster into a champion.

recommendations.title: Pokémon Detective Pikachu
recommendations.overview: In a world where people collect pocket-size monsters (Pokémon) to do battle, a boy comes across an intelligent monster who seeks to be a detective.
